content_blocks.text:
## 4. Registration with FIU-IND

### 4.1 Registration as a Mandatory Pre-Requisite

In accordance with Paragraph 2.1 of the 2026 FIU-IND Guidelines and the provisions of PMLA and PML Rules framed thereunder, registration with FIU-IND is a mandatory pre-requisite for the Company to engage in any activity or operation notified under Ministry of Finance Notification S.O. 1072(E) dated March 7, 2023. Non-registration shall be deemed a violation of the provisions of PMLA and may invite action under Section 13(2) of PMLA, in addition to any other enforcement measures as may be applicable.

The Company acknowledges that the registration framework as set out in Chapter 2 of the 2026 Guidelines codifies and consolidates the requirements earlier set out in the FIU-IND Circular for Registration of VDA SPs dated September 15, 2025.

### 4.2 Registration Status

**FIU-IND Reporting Entity Identification Number:** [INSERT RE-ID]

**Date of Registration:** [INSERT DATE]

**Director-approved Date of Registration:** [INSERT DATE]

The Company shall maintain proof of registration and shall produce the same to relevant authorities upon request.

### 4.6 Risk of Denial or Cancellation

The Company acknowledges that pursuant to Paragraph 2.5.3 of the 2026 Guidelines, the Director, FIU-IND, reserves the right to deny or cancel registration if the Company fails to fulfil its obligations under PMLA. The Company shall therefore ensure ongoing operational readiness to demonstrate compliance at any time.
